calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sean Hughes, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joseph Campbell.
Exhibit 1- Ten-Day Notice-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 730 Eddy St., #310, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent and Holdover Damages $606.06
Waived Costs, for a Total of $606.06
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Sean Hughes, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff The Tides Center, A California Non Profit Public Benefit Corporation.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Rossoff, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Joseph Campbell is present.
Attorney, Sally Brown, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of October 22, 2007 remains on calendar.
